time-range.description: Time range for source data selection.

end.description: Ending date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

start.description: Starting date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

timezone.description: The timezone index or name. Time range in request and date/time if any in response will follow this timezone. See Appendix

data-format.description: The format of the exporting data.

filter.description: A filter for selecting exporting subnets and subnet groups

address-group.description: The filter array of names. If all subnet groups will be exported, set this filter to null ("address-group": null,). If none of the subnet groups will be exported, leave the filter array blank ("address-group": [],).

address-object.description: The filter array of names. If all subnets will be exported, set this filter to null ("address-object": null,). If none of the subnets will be exported, leave the filter array blank ("address-object": [],).

items.description: The object in the exported subnet group.

items.description: The objects in the referred subnet group.

name.description: The name of the referred subnet group.

address-objs.description: The subnets referred in the exported subnet group.

items.description: The objects in the referred subnet.

name.description: The name of the referred subnet.

length.description: Length of the returned data stream.

end.description: Ending date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

start.description: Starting date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

info.description:
Documentation for FortiAnalyzer JSON API

This daemon controls main system functions, including log in and log out. All APIs for this module are under the prefix /sys/.
info.title: FortiAnalyzer JSON API Documentation

post.description: Start a task to run a playbook.

Request of importing subnet and subnet groups.
